UCS-68  IMPACT TESTING METHODS. (a) Impact tests required by UCS-56 and UG-84 shall be performed in accordance with the methods described in this paragraph. (b) Tests shall be conducted at or below the MDMT as determined per UCS-66 or UCS-67. (c) Three specimens shall be tested for each required set. The absorbed energy values shall meet the acceptance criteria of UG-84. Specimens shall be prepared per UCS-57. For heat-treated material specimens, refer to UCS-85. See also UCS-56 for when testing is required. Testing equipment shall be calibrated in accordance with this paragraph.
